summary: M435 — Battle grid v3 cleanup: combat layout extracted into src/ui/combatLayout.js (pure function, 7 unit tests covering column ordering, no-companion shift, single-enemy centering, vertical stack, no-overlap guarantee, placement.x margin behavior, tall-column compression). Deleted src/ui/EvBattlefield.js, src/ui/ev-battlefield.css, the import in main.js, and the dead _evBattlefield destroy/listener cleanup branches in CombatScreen. Combat is now a single canvas-only rendering path: combatLayout → canvas sprites + canvas position tiles + DOM status overlay anchored to canvas coords + canvas-pointerdown spell targeting.
